texto: All the men send you orchids because they're expensive and they know that you know they are. But I always kind of think they're cheap, don't you, just because they're expensive. Like telling someone how much you paid for something to show off.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Winifred Watson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “All the men send you orchids because they're expensive and they know that you know they are. But …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, cheapness, flowers pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e flowers.
